mbg-Student Clubs

HASGEN  (GENETICS AND SCIENCE CLUB)

The Genetics and Science Club (HASGEN), founded by KHAS Molecular Biology and Genetics students in 2018, is a social and academic student club that organizes seminars, events, and meetings in various disciplines, particularly genetics.

Since its establishment, HASGEN has organized several face-to-face and online events. Creating platforms to meet well-known academicians, HASGEN assembles all the students interested in engineering and science at Kadir Has University under the same roof.

Please feel free to contact us if you are interested in science, want to meet new people, and become part of this great family.

Stay with Science!
